items.definition_en: A watering can is a container used to pour water on plants.
items.example_en: I filled the watering can to water the flowers.

items.definition_en: A hose is a long tube that carries water to plants.
items.example_en: He used the hose to water the garden.

items.definition_en: A bucket is a round container for holding and carrying water.
items.example_en: She filled a bucket with water for the plants.

items.definition_en: A sprinkler is a device that spreads water over a garden.
items.example_en: The sprinkler watered the lawn in the afternoon.

items.definition_en: A tap is a device that controls the flow of water.
items.example_en: Turn off the tap when you finish watering.

items.definition_en: A drip system gives water to plants slowly through small pipes.
items.example_en: We use a drip system to water the vegetables.

items.definition_en: A rainwater tank is a large container for collecting rain water.
items.example_en: The rainwater tank supplies water for the garden.

items.definition_en: A nozzle is an end part of a hose or can that directs water flow.
items.example_en: He adjusted the nozzle to spray the plants gently.

items.definition_en: A spout is a part from which water comes out of a watering can.
items.example_en: Water came out of the spout smoothly.

items.definition_en: A sprayer is a tool that spreads water in a fine mist.
items.example_en: She used a sprayer for the small plants.

items.definition_en: A watering system is equipment set up to water plants easily.
items.example_en: The garden has an automatic watering system.

items.definition_en: A pipe is a long tube that carries water to different places.
items.example_en: Water moves through the pipe to the garden bed.

items.definition_en: A pump is a machine that moves water from one place to another.
items.example_en: The pump helped move water to the higher beds.

items.definition_en: A water barrel is a large container for holding water.
items.example_en: Rainwater filled the water barrel quickly.

items.definition_en: A moisture meter is a tool that checks how wet the soil is.
items.example_en: I used a moisture meter to test the soil before watering.

items.definition_en: A water tank is a container where water is stored.
items.example_en: They filled the water tank before watering the beds.

items.definition_en: A watering timer is a device that controls when watering starts and stops.
items.example_en: The watering timer made sure the plants got water every morning.

items.definition_en: A watering wand is a long tool for reaching and watering plants easily.
items.example_en: He used a watering wand for the hanging baskets.

items.definition_en: Tap water is water that comes from a tap and is used for watering.
items.example_en: She used tap water to water the tomatoes.

items.definition_en: Watering duty means the job of making sure plants get water.
items.example_en: I have watering duty on weekends.
